creator: danny@dannywarren.com
text:
Also, can you point me at any discussion topics that cover how or why we arrived at using these specific config changes in the stock screenrc?

All of the discussions topics I've seen so far revolve around how best to implement the example configs in the port, but I haven't found any discussion regarding the config changes themselves.

From what I can tell, this sample screenrc originates from PC-BSD and was submitted as-is by PC-BSD's maintainer.  Looking at the file in PC-BSD's repo, there are no comments and no further details in their commit log either.

I would offer to submit a patch that adds comments to the new screenrc, but I can't find any paper trail on why the config changes were needed or requested in the first place.
